title: Ethics dilemma
description: You walk past a colleague's desk and see their SSO password on a sticky note. What do you do? Respond in 150+ words citing at least two ISC2 Code of Ethics canons (protect society/common good; act honorably; provide diligent service; advance the profession). Amaka grades this personally.

widgetConfig.placeholder: Describe your response. Name the canons you invoke and explain how you would act, who you would inform, and how you would help your colleague without shaming them.
